title: 10 best herbal essential oils for knee swelling
description: Echinacea angustifolia, also known as Kansas coneflower, essential oils helps with knee swelling because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The oil's active compounds, such as alkylamides and phenolic acids, have been shown to reduce inflammation and pain in the joints. These compounds work by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory chemicals and promoting the production of anti-inflammatory cytokines, which helps to reduce swelling and pain in the knees.
